title: Gaddiy #1426
definition:
Gaddi = "my fortune"

 1) the son of Susi, spy from the tribe of Manasseh sent by Moses to
    spy out the land of Canaan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gaddi = "my fortune"

 1) the son of Susi, spy from the tribe of Manasseh sent by Moses to
    spy out the land of Canaan

    NASB:  my fortune, a Manassite
